# Banana Scale Preview Asset

`banana.glb` is used as the browser preview reference object for "banana for scale".

- Source page: https://poly.pizza/m/5Z07I9KMob
- Creator: Kenney
- License: Public Domain (CC0 1.0)
- Download URL used: https://static.poly.pizza/bd78ebc9-2834-45d5-af16-e00f604bdf36.glb
- Retrieved: 2026-05-18

Note: GLB is used in the browser because it keeps the banana material colors, while STL would require repainting in code.
